error_signature: IF node always returns true for non-existent file
title: IF node incorrectly evaluates non-existent Google Drive file
symptom: The IF node always returns true when checking for a non-existent Google Drive file, leading to incorrect workflow execution.
applies_when: Using IF node to check file existence
not_this_if: File existence check is done correctly with proper conditions
root_cause: The IF node was incorrectly configured to check for the existence of a file using a direct reference to the ID. When the file does not exist, the ID is undefined, which does not trigger the expected behavior in the IF node.
fix_steps: Change the condition to use `{{ $json.id || '' }}` with the 'is empty' operator
agent_instruction: Update the IF node condition to check if the ID is empty using the provided expression.
